meaning: n.[生化]细胞分裂素(指促进细胞分裂的一类植物激素中的任何一种)
examples: Triacanthine, however, has no cytokinin activity, but this appears when it is autoclaved.
TDZ (Thidiazuron) was used as cytokinin in tissue culture of taro in different genotypes.
Nevertheless it has been shown that side-chain planarity is important in conferring high adenyl cytokinin activity.
